name: Barbecued Beef on Buns
recipeInstructions:
Roast Beef should be thinly sliced and there should be 8 to 10 slices.
1. Mix catsup, brown sugar, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, onion salt, and pepper in a 2-cup glass measure.
2. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 1 1/2 minutes; stir.
3. Continue microwaving to boiling, 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Layer half the beef slices and half the sauce in a 1-Qt casserole dish. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
5. Cover and microwave on high (100%) until hot and bubbly, 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes.
6. Place bottom halves of buns on serving plate.
7. Top with beef and remaining bun halves.
8. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 30 seconds to 1 minute until buns are hot.
